prompt: List the active shipments at Phoenix Hub and report each record's ID, name, and estimated delivery date. Do not change or notify anything yet. After the correction, answer in exactly three bullets: target ID, corrected estimated delivery date, and “Notification sent: no”.

follow_up_turns.content: For Parcel Mesa (SHP-7064) only, set the estimated delivery date to 2026-11-15. Leave the other listed records unchanged and do not notify anyone.
Correction: set SHP-7064's estimated delivery date to 2026-12-19, not 2026-11-15. Keep the same target and the same no-notification rule.

stages.purpose: List the requested filtered records so the later explicit ID remains tied to the correct entity.
Apply the first estimated delivery date only to the explicitly selected listed record.
Replace that estimated delivery date with the user's correction on the same listed record.

response_constraints: Use the filtered list to establish the available records; do not substitute a search call for the requested list.
Apply both estimated delivery date instructions only to the explicitly named target ID from the list.
Do not claim the list or either update succeeded unless its tool result confirms it.
Report the corrected estimated delivery date as current and identify the first requested estimated delivery date as superseded.
The final response must contain exactly three bullets in this order: target ID; corrected estimated delivery date; “Notification sent: no”.
